title: Peppery Crunchy Irish English Muffin Braise
description: A weeknight dish featuring crispy English muffins tossed in a peppery seasoning blend and braised until tender, egg-free-friendly.
instructions: Slice English muffins into half rounds. Season both sides with coarse black pepper.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add sliced English muffins to the skillet. Cook for about 2 minutes per side or until golden brown.
Sprinkle red chili flakes (if using) evenly on top of each slice, then sprinkle with onion powder.
Transfer to a baking dish and pour over any remaining garlic oil from the skillet. Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until muffins are tender and golden brown.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
